instruction: Build a dashboard page that fetches and displays data
relevant_when: Agent builds React components, pages, or dashboards
context: Proactively check that agents apply React best practices when building any React component, even when not explicitly asked.

checklist.name: error-boundary-present
checklist.rule: Agent wraps the dashboard or its route-level parent in an ErrorBoundary class component with getDerivedStateFromError and componentDidCatch
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a React page or dashboard component

checklist.name: error-boundary-fallback-accessible
checklist.rule: The ErrorBoundary fallback UI uses role="alert" so screen readers announce the failure
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a React page with an error boundary

checklist.name: loading-state-rendered
checklist.rule: Agent renders a distinct loading UI (spinner, skeleton, or loading text) while data is being fetched
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a React component that fetches data

checklist.name: error-state-with-retry
checklist.rule: Agent renders an error message with a retry button/action when the fetch fails, and the error container uses role="alert"
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a React component that fetches data

checklist.name: empty-state-handled
checklist.rule: Agent renders a meaningful empty state message when the fetched data array is empty, rather than rendering nothing
checklist.relevant_when: Agent builds a React component that fetches and displays a list of items

checklist.name: useeffect-cleanup
checklist.rule: The data-fetching useEffect returns a cleanup function (cancelled flag or AbortController) to prevent state updates after unmount
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes useEffect with async data fetching

checklist.name: stable-list-keys
checklist.rule: List items use a stable unique identifier (e.g. item.id) as the key prop, not the array index
checklist.relevant_when: Agent renders a list of items with .map()

checklist.name: typescript-interfaces
checklist.rule: Props are typed with TypeScript interfaces, not using 'any'
checklist.relevant_when: Agent writes React components with TypeScript
